case_title: MYRON WILLIE-LEE BISHOP VS. SABOLA OREY MACKEY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40-SHERIFF'S) SERVED FEB-23-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACKEY, SABOLA OREY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BISHOP, MYRON WILLIE-LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACKEY, SABOLA OREY $2,591.41 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,681.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,591.41 FILED BY BISHOP, MYRON WILLIE-LEE AS TO DEFENDANT MACKEY, SABOLA OREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MYRON WILLIE-LEE BISHOP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2022 - JUDGMENT.
